page_metadata.biotools__summary: PlasClass is a tool for easy classification of sequences as either plasmid or chromosomal. For example, it can be used to classify the contigs in a (metagenomic) assembly.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PlasClass is a tool for easy classification of sequences as either plasmid or chromosomal. For example, it can be used to classify the contigs in a (metagenomic) assembly.
